narrative:
Green Township has 1,651 registered voters, with 55.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.7 percentage points.
